## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Mercury's banking solutions for GrowthX's evolving financial needs and potential transition to a new C-Corp structure.](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is transitioning from an LLC to a C-Corp structure, seeking a more responsive banking partner for their rapid growth (4M ARR in 7 months)](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Mercury offers consolidated banking, treasury management (4.1-4.6% yield), and flexible credit limits based on deposits](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [GrowthX plans to open a Mercury account after C-Corp formation, with emphasis on quick credit card access for operational continuity](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Mercury provides tools for safe agreements, cap table management integration, and customizable card controls, but lacks comprehensive bill pay with built-in 1099 management](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

## Topics

### Current Banking Situation and Pain Points

  - [Using Chase (private client) and Ramp for business banking](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Issues with Chase: unresponsive, slow credit limit increases, declined transactions](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Ramp: limited credit increases despite strong financials](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Need for better visibility, simplified operations, and technology-driven banking solutions](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

### Business Growth and Structure

  - [Transitioning from LLC to C-Corp in early 2024](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [4 million in ARR expected by January, bootstrapped and profitable](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Planning to raise $10-15 million in January, potentially through a SAFE](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Mercury's Banking Solutions

  - [Treasury product: No lock-up period, 4.1-4.6% yield through Vanguard or Morgan Stanley](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Credit limits: \~25% of total deposits, including treasury funds](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Account opening: Quick 10-15 minute application, same-day setup possible](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - ["Day zero" credit card access for immediate operational needs](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Sub-accounts with auto-transfer rules for organized fund management](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [SAFE agreement generation and execution tools](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Integrations with cap table management tools like Carta](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

### Card Management and Expense Tracking

  - [Virtual and physical cards with customizable limits and category locks](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Subscription tracking and management](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Mobile receipt capture integrated with QuickBooks](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Bill Pay and Vendor Management

  - [OCR-enabled invoice inbox for streamlined bill payments](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Lacks comprehensive bill pay with built-in W-9 collection and 1099 issuance](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Integration with QuickBooks for transaction categorization and accounting](https://fathom.video/share/yGsReoa2kfSnHHrzccnQAN3AfPZSps7K?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marcel to initiate Mercury account setup once C-Corp formation is complete in January
  - James to follow up with more information on bill pay W-9/1099 management capabilities
  - Marcel to evaluate Mercury's offering against current needs, particularly the bill pay and vendor management aspects
  - James to provide demo environment access for Marcel to explore Mercury's features in depth
